narration: Two people retire the same month with identical savings. One runs out in sixteen years, the other never does. Here's why.
visual: Dark background. Two matching person silhouettes side by side — left in red labeled 'RETIRED 2000', right in green labeled 'RETIRED 2010'. Both hold a briefcase tagged '$1M'. Over the animation the red person's money stack bar collapses to near-zero while the green person's bar grows to '$2.1M'. Title 'SAME MONEY. DIFFERENT FATES.' springs in at top in amber.

narration: The 4% rule says withdraw four percent a year, your money lasts thirty years. It only works if the market cooperates early.
visual: Light background. A large pink piggy bank SVG center-stage with a coin slot at top. An amber arrow pulls '4% = $40K/YEAR' out from the side. Below: large green 'WORKS 95% OF TIME' counter, then a red asterisk and 'IF MARKET COOPERATES EARLY' warning box flashes in.

narration: If the market crashes right when you retire, you're forced to sell at rock-bottom prices just to pay bills. That hole never fills back up.
visual: Dark background. Two side-by-side line charts animate from left to right. Left chart 'RETIRED 2000': line drops sharply then crawls to $0 — labeled 'BROKE 2016'. Right chart 'RETIRED 2010': line trends steadily upward to $2.1M. Both start at the same $1M baseline. Charts draw in simultaneously frame-by-frame.

narration: The 2000 retiree's million dollars was gone by 2016 — just sixteen years. The 2010 retiree still had two point one million by 2025.
visual: Light background. Two animated bar charts fill from left and right. Left bar labeled '2000 RETIREE' in red depletes from $1M down to $0 with a 'BROKE BY 2016' stamp. Right bar '2010 RETIREE' in green grows from $1M up to $2.1M with 'STILL GROWING' label. 'SAME 4% RULE' text in center between bars.

narration: Three moves protect you: keep a two-year cash buffer, flex your withdrawals in down years, and delay one year if the market just crashed.
visual: Dark background. Three amber shields spring in one at a time. Shield 1: piggy bank icon, '1 — CASH BUFFER / 1-2 YRS EXPENSES'. Shield 2: graph icon, '2 — FLEX WITHDRAWALS / CUT 10% IN DOWN YEARS'. Shield 3: calendar icon, '3 — GUARD YEAR / DELAY IF MARKET CRASHES'. Dotted connecting lines between shields.

narration: Timing matters as much as saving — most calculators never tell you that. Follow for the real numbers behind retirement nobody talks about.
visual: Light background. A large dartboard SVG with a dart landing in the outer ring labeled 'WRONG YEAR'. Bold amber text: 'TIMING MATTERS AS MUCH AS SAVING'. Below it: 'MOST CALCULATORS LIE TO YOU ABOUT THIS'. Large amber CTA button: 'FOLLOW FOR RETIREMENT TRUTH' springs in at bottom.
